name: aawp
description: AAWP (AI Agent Wallet Protocol) — the only crypto wallet protocol built exclusively for AI Agents on EVM-compatible blockchains and Solana. Not for humans. The signer is the AI Agent itself, cryptographically bound at wallet creation. Supports wallet lifecycle management, token transfers, DEX swaps, cross-chain bridging, Solana native trading (Pump.fun SDK + Jupiter), token launches, DCA automation, and price alerts.
